**Note on confidence:** The confidence score is lowered due to the contradiction flagged in `notes` (category labeled INTAKE but body describes renewal AND report with inconsistent figures). Per the ground-truth rule, I have used only the normalized record's fields (`category=INTAKE`, `amount=5000.0`, `deadline=2026-07-26`), but the internal inconsistency warrants review before final approval.
